results.description: Baseline with original v1.1.0 skill (180 lines + 399-line references file)
Compressed to v2.0.0 (~70 lines), removed references/schema-examples.md, inlined Product and FAQPage templates, added explicit rules for numeric types and enumeration URLs

changes: Compressed SKILL.md from ~180 lines (v1.1.0) to ~70 lines (v2.0.0)
Removed references/schema-examples.md (399 lines) — relevant examples inlined
Removed: Initial Assessment, Core Principles, Validation & Testing, Implementation, CMS/WordPress, Output Format, Task-Specific Questions, Related Skills, @graph examples
Added explicit Rules section (numeric prices/ratings, full schema.org URLs, reviewCount as integer)
Inlined concrete JSON-LD templates for Product and FAQPage
